note: READ-ONLY planning phase. No DB write. No adapter implemented. No lifecycle promotion. No dry-run rows generated.

context.p35_deferred_wave3_reason: BIG_LOTTO RETIRED adapter framework not yet established. DAILY_539 adapter pattern established by P31A/P31B; BIG_LOTTO requires analogous bootstrap step before any replay rows can be generated.

wave3_candidates.special_number_strategy: RANDOM_FROM_REMAINING — no special prediction, record actual special for scoring only
wave3_candidates.algorithm_summary: 1st-order Markov transition from last draw (window=100). Select top-6 by next_scores. Deterministic.
wave3_candidates.blocking_issues: BIG_LOTTO adapter scaffold (p41_wave3_biglotto_adapters.py) must be created in P42
wave3_candidates.recommendation_for_p42: INCLUDE — simplest BIG_LOTTO strategy; first candidate for new scaffold
wave3_candidates.notes: strat_markov_single already exists in backtest_biglotto_comprehensive.py line 137. Wrapper is trivial. Medium risk due to BIG_LOTTO scaffold not yet established.

wave3_candidates.main_numbers_range: 6 unique ints in [1,49] per bet, 2 bets (bet-1 only recorded per row)
wave3_candidates.special_number_strategy: RANDOM_FROM_REMAINING — record actual special for hit scoring only
wave3_candidates.algorithm_summary: Same Markov transition as markov_single but num_bets=2. Top-6 for bet-1, next-6 for bet-2. Replay records bet-1 only per DAILY_539 pattern.
wave3_candidates.blocking_issues: BIG_LOTTO adapter scaffold must be created in P42; same prerequisite as markov_single_biglotto
wave3_candidates.bootstrap_gap: Same scaffold as markov_single; pair together for coherence
wave3_candidates.recommendation_for_p42: INCLUDE — 2-bet variant of markov_single; trivial extension after scaffold exists
wave3_candidates.notes: Functionally identical code path to markov_single with num_bets=2. Pair with markov_single in same adapter file.

wave3_candidates.main_numbers_range: 6 unique ints in [1,49] per bet, 2 bets (bet-1 only per row)
wave3_candidates.special_number_strategy: RANDOM_FROM_REMAINING — record actual special for hit scoring only
wave3_candidates.algorithm_summary: FFT period detection over 500-period window. Score each number by distance-to-peak-period. Select top-12 split into 2 orthogonal bets. Uses scipy.fft. Deterministic.
wave3_candidates.blocking_issues: BIG_LOTTO adapter scaffold must be created in P42; scipy.fft dependency (already in project venv)
wave3_candidates.bootstrap_gap: Scaffold needed; scipy dependency already satisfied
wave3_candidates.recommendation_for_p42: INCLUDE — strat_fourier_rhythm already implemented; wrap bet-1 only
wave3_candidates.notes: strat_fourier_rhythm at line 57 of backtest_biglotto_comprehensive.py. scipy.fft import needed inside adapter function.

wave3_candidates.main_numbers_range: 6 unique ints in [1,49] per bet, 2 bets (bet-1 only per row)
wave3_candidates.special_number_strategy: RANDOM_FROM_REMAINING — record actual special for hit scoring only
wave3_candidates.algorithm_summary: Bet-1: Fourier30 (weighted freq over 30 draws, linear ramp). Bet-2: Markov30 (transition matrix over 30 draws). Diversification enforced: max_overlap=3. Deterministic.
wave3_candidates.blocking_issues: BIG_LOTTO adapter scaffold must be created in P42; helper functions _bet1_fourier30_biglotto and _bet2_markov30_biglotto and _diversify_biglotto must be inlined or imported
wave3_candidates.bootstrap_gap: Scaffold + helper function inlining or module import
wave3_candidates.recommendation_for_p42: INCLUDE — strat_fourier30_markov30 at line 280; helper functions at lines 187-277 can be inlined in adapter
wave3_candidates.notes: Three helper functions needed: _bet1_fourier30_biglotto, _bet2_markov30_biglotto, _diversify_biglotto. All self-contained in backtest_biglotto_comprehensive.py.

wave3_candidates.main_numbers_range: 6 unique ints in [1,49] per bet, 2 bets (bet-1 only per row)
wave3_candidates.special_number_strategy: RANDOM_FROM_REMAINING — record actual special for hit scoring only
wave3_candidates.algorithm_summary: Top-12 coldest numbers from last 100 draws (sorted by ascending freq). Split into 2 orthogonal bets: bet-1 = coldest 6, bet-2 = next coldest 6. Deterministic.
wave3_candidates.blocking_issues: BIG_LOTTO adapter scaffold must be created in P42
wave3_candidates.bootstrap_gap: Scaffold only; algorithm is trivially simple
wave3_candidates.recommendation_for_p42: INCLUDE — strat_cold_complement at line 111; simplest frequency-based strategy
wave3_candidates.notes: P35 listed source as backtest_biglotto_enhancements.py::cold_numbers_bet but strat_cold_complement in backtest_biglotto_comprehensive.py is functionally equivalent and simpler to wrap.

wave3_candidates.special_number_strategy: RANDOM_FROM_REMAINING — record actual special for hit scoring only
wave3_candidates.algorithm_summary: Same cold-frequency logic as cold_complement but pool=15 (top-15 coldest numbers). Pick-6 from 15-number cold pool. Deterministic. Pool size = 15 vs 12 for cold_complement.
wave3_candidates.blocking_issues: BIG_LOTTO adapter scaffold must be created in P42; cold_numbers_bet in enhancements file or inline cold pool-15 logic
wave3_candidates.bootstrap_gap: Scaffold + confirm pool=15 parameter semantics vs cold_complement
wave3_candidates.recommendation_for_p42: INCLUDE — pair with cold_complement; trivial pool-size variant
wave3_candidates.notes: Pair with cold_complement_biglotto in same adapter block. One parameter difference: pool size 15 vs 12. Must confirm that 1-bet is recorded (not 2-bet split).

bootstrap_design.description: BIG_LOTTO replay adapter scaffold — analogous to p36_wave2_daily539_adapters.py but for BIG_LOTTO (1-49 pick-6 + special)

adapter_input_contract.history: List[dict] — each dict has 'draw' (str), 'date' (str YYYY/MM/DD), 'numbers' (List[int] of 6 ints in [1,49]), 'special' (int in [1,49])
adapter_input_contract.cutoff_semantics: All draws in history MUST have date STRICTLY BEFORE target draw date. No future draw data may be used.
adapter_input_contract.causal_slice: history = draws[:target_idx] — exclude target draw itself

prediction_record_schema.target_draw: str — draw number of the predicted draw (TEXT type in DB)
prediction_record_schema.target_date: str — YYYY/MM/DD date of the predicted draw
prediction_record_schema.history_cutoff_draw: str — draw number of last draw used (last element of history)
prediction_record_schema.prediction_cutoff_date: str — date of last draw used (YYYY/MM/DD)
prediction_record_schema.predicted_numbers: JSON str of sorted list of 6 unique ints in [1,49]
prediction_record_schema.predicted_special: null (None) — Wave 3 strategies do NOT predict special number
prediction_record_schema.actual_numbers: JSON str of actual 6 main numbers from draw
prediction_record_schema.actual_special: int — actual special number from draw
prediction_record_schema.hit_numbers: JSON str of intersection of predicted_numbers and actual_numbers
prediction_record_schema.hit_count: int — len(hit_numbers) — covers main numbers only
prediction_record_schema.special_hit: 0 — always 0 for strategies that do not predict special
prediction_record_schema.dry_run: 0 (temp rehearsal in /tmp/p42_temp.db) or 1 (production row in lottery_v2.db)
prediction_record_schema.prediction_generated_at: ISO datetime string when prediction was generated

key_differences_from_daily539.pick_count: BIG_LOTTO: 6 numbers per bet vs DAILY_539: 5 numbers per bet
key_differences_from_daily539.special_number: BIG_LOTTO has special number (1-49). DAILY_539 has none.
key_differences_from_daily539.special_prediction: Wave 3 strategies do NOT predict special — predicted_special=None, special_hit=0 always
key_differences_from_daily539.zone_definitions: BIG_LOTTO zones: Z1=1-16, Z2=17-32, Z3=33-49 (3 zones of ~16 each)

cutoff_semantics.rule: No draws after prediction_cutoff_date may be used to generate the prediction
cutoff_semantics.enforcement: history = [d for d in all_draws if d['date'] < target_date]
cutoff_semantics.rolling_window: For 1500-draw generation: iterate over last 1500 BIG_LOTTO draws, use all prior draws as history for each
cutoff_semantics.data_leakage_prevention: history MUST be strictly before target_draw — causal slice only

generated_at_semantics.rule: prediction_generated_at = datetime when prediction row is physically written
generated_at_semantics.dry_run_approach: Use datetime.utcnow().isoformat() at time of adapter call
generated_at_semantics.replay_approach: Use a fixed reference datetime matching run start, OR draw-relative datetime for reproducibility

lifecycle_flow.temp_rehearsal: DRY_RUN rows go ONLY to /tmp/p42_temp.db — never to lottery_v2.db
lifecycle_flow.production_apply: Separate P43 authorization required before any rows enter lottery_v2.db
lifecycle_flow.forbidden: DO NOT register adapters in _ALL_ADAPTERS or _REGISTRY during P42

special_number_scoring.actual_special_recording: Record draws.special for each target draw in actual_special column
special_number_scoring.special_hit_calculation: special_hit = 1 if predicted_special is not None AND predicted_special == actual_special ELSE 0
special_number_scoring.wave3_result: special_hit always 0 because predicted_special is None for all Wave 3 strategies
special_number_scoring.future_extension: Wave 4+ strategies may implement special number prediction using e.g. unified_predictor markov_v2_predict

p42_recommended_scope.title: Wave 3 BIG_LOTTO Dry-run + Temp Rehearsal
p42_recommended_scope.description: Analogous to P36 for DAILY_539. Create p42_wave3_biglotto_adapters.py, run 1500-draw dry-run for each of 6 candidates in /tmp/p42_temp.db, validate rows, STOP before production apply.
p42_recommended_scope.batch_rationale: All 6 are LOW-effort, LOW-complexity, same BIG_LOTTO pool. Single coherent batch minimizes scaffold overhead. All share same adapter file and scaffold.
p42_recommended_scope.note: ESTIMATE ONLY — not applied. Rows will only be added if P43 production apply is authorized after P42 dry-run passes.
p42_recommended_scope.temp_rehearsal_pattern: Follow P36 pattern: write _P42AdapterMeta + _P42BaseAdapter; scaffold in p42_wave3_biglotto_adapters.py; dry-run to /tmp/p42_temp.db
p42_recommended_scope.stop_condition: STOP before production apply. P42 = dry-run + temp rehearsal only. Production apply requires separate P43 authorization.

r1_r2_r3_checks.R2: All predicted_numbers have exactly 6 unique ints in [1,49]; all hit_count in [0,6]; no special_hit > 0
r1_r2_r3_checks.R3: No rows inserted into lottery_v2.db; production row count still 28960

p42_recommended_scope.production_rows_note: ESTIMATE ONLY — 28960 current + 9000 new = 37960. Requires P43 authorization.

risk_factors: BIG_LOTTO adapter scaffold does not yet exist — primary bootstrap risk
scipy.fft dependency needed for bet2_fourier_expansion_biglotto — already in venv
Helper function inlining needed for fourier30_markov30_biglotto (_bet1, _bet2, _diversify)
coldpool15_biglotto pool=15 semantics must be verified vs cold_complement pool=12
BIG_LOTTO draw history has 2136 draws — sufficient for 1500-draw rolling window
mitigations: Follow p36_wave2_daily539_adapters.py as template — only pool constants change
All 6 algorithms are deterministic (no random seed needed for reproducibility)
Source code for all algorithms exists in backtest_biglotto_comprehensive.py
Temp DB rehearsal in /tmp/p42_temp.db isolates from production

forbidden_file_scan: CLEAN — no adapter implementation, no DB write, no registry mutation, no lifecycle promotion, no dry-run row generation
next_phase: P42: Wave 3 BIG_LOTTO Dry-run + Temp Rehearsal (6 strategies, estimated 9000 rows)
